payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Rectangular interior window filling most of the crop with lowered white horizontal blinds (plastic/metal slats) that are mostly closed, framed by dark black fabric curtains on both sides; faint daylight filters through small slat gaps. Window appears fully visible (not edge-cropped) and mounted in a light-colored frame; estimated distance from camera ~2.5 meters.
